Physical relationships: The mustard bottle is resting on top of the red box and is in near-contact with the small metal can to its left.
Reason: The object is mostly unconstrained on its right and bottom sides, allowing for quick and safe retrieval in those directions.
Best direction reason: Directions from 1 to 6 o'clock are completely free of obstacles, leading into open space.
Worst direction reason: Moving towards 9 or 10 o'clock will cause a direct collision with the adjacent small metal can.
